title: Create Warium
description: I somehow got Create mod and warium to play nice together
body:
I somehow got Create and Warium to load together, this modpack was created for the sake of convienance for the Warium Vs community. it contains everything nessisary at time of creation to run it.

here's a link to the warium discord
https://discord.gg/mMSzkgWzrz

plz put any questions comments or concerns below. i usually get around to fixing
